bioconda.name: roary
bioconda.summary: Rapid large-scale prokaryote pan genome analysis

biocontainers.name: roary
biocontainers.summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in gff3 format (produced by prokka (seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.

biotools.summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.

bioschemas.name: Roary
bioschemas.summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.

galaxy.bio_tools_summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.
